name: Ichiki Sayori-Hime
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>斎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イチ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>キ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>狭</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヨリ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒメ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand. You can only use each of the following effects of "Ichiki Sayori-Hime" once per turn. If you control a monster with 800 ATK or DEF, and this card is in your hand: Immediately after this effect resolves, you can Normal Summon this card. If this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 Level 4 LIGHT or DARK monster with 800 ATK or DEF from your Deck to your hand, except "Ichiki Sayori-Hime".
